connectorUiConfig.title: Tanium's Basic Inventory Push Connector
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: This data feeds Sentinel with the latest basic inventory, so analysts can use this to potentially enrich incidents, visualize endpoint risk and health, and automate investigation and response workflows. For more details about Tanium, head to [https://www.tanium.com/contact-us/](https://www.tanium.com/contact-us/)

dataTypes.name: TaniumMainAsset_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
TaniumMainAsset_CL
| summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Time)

value:
TaniumMainAsset_CL
| summarize LastLogReceived = max(TimeGenerated)
| project IsConnected = LastLogReceived > ago(1h)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: read and write permissions are required.

customs.name: Microsoft Entra
customs.description: Permission to create an app registration in Microsoft Entra ID.

customs.name: Microsoft Azure
customs.description: Permission to assign Monitoring Metrics Publisher role on data collection rule (DCR).

instructionSteps.title: 1. Create ARM Resources and Provide the Required Permissions
instructionSteps.description: This connector enables your Tanium Server to push Basic Inventory data directly to Microsoft Sentinel via the Azure Monitor Ingestion API.

parameters.content:
#### Automated Configuration and Secure Data Ingestion with Entra Application 
Clicking on "Deploy" will trigger the creation of Log Analytics table and a Data Collection Rule (DCR). 
It will then create an Entra application, link the DCR to it, and set the entered secret in the application. This setup enables the Tanium data to be sent securely to the DCR using an Entra token.

instructionSteps.title: 2. Configure Tanium Connections
instructionSteps.description: Use the following parameters to configure the your Tanium Connections to push data to the workspace.

parameters.label: Entra App Registration Application ID
parameters.placeholder: Deploy push connector to get the App Registration Application ID (aka Client Id)

parameters.label: Entra App Registration Secret
parameters.placeholder: Deploy push connector to get the App Registration Secret (aka Client Secret)

parameters.label: Data Collection Endpoint Uri
parameters.placeholder: Deploy push connector to get the Data Collection Endpoint Uri

parameters.label: Data Collection Rule Immutable ID
parameters.placeholder: Deploy push connector to get the Data Collection Rule Immutable ID

instructionSteps.title: 3. Create the Connection in Tanium
instructionSteps.description: After you've successfully deployed the data connector in Azure, create the required connection in your Tanium server in the Connect Module. For more information regarding the Connect module see [Tanium Help](https://help.tanium.com/bundle/ug_connect_cloud/page/connect/overview.html)

parameters.content:
#### Option 1: Import the Connection
1. Create a new JSON file.
2. Copy the JSON below into the file.
3. Replace the placeholders with the parameters displayed above.
4. In your Tanium Server open the Connect Module.
5. Import the file to create the connection.

```json
[
{
	"name": "Sentinel - Basic Inventory (Azure Monitor)",
	"description": "Tanium asset information to be sent to Sentinel",
	"minimumPassPercentage": 0,
	"logLevel": 30,
	"tempLogLevel": 30,
	"tempLogLevelRuns": 0,
	"schedule": "0 0 * * *",
	"scheduleTimeZone": "UTC",
	"moduleCallbackUri": null,
	"maxOldSpaceSize": 1,
	"streams": [
		{
			"route": "/v1/sources/pluginConfigurations/reporting/reporting-source",
			"arguments": {
				"config": {
					"reportID": "default-sentinel-basic-inventory",
					"viewID": "source data",
					"reportDisplayName": "Sentinel - Basic Inventory"
				},
				"module": "reporting",
				"plugin": "reporting-source",
				"type": "sources",
				"destinationType": null,
				"name": "reporting-reporting-source-fd68c73d-d173-4f12-a845-10e4fcd67043"
			}
		},
		{
			"route": "/v1/formats/columns",
			"arguments": {
				"columns": [
					{
						"checked": true,
						"name": "Computer Name",
						"renameTo": "ComputerName",
						"type": "source",
						"valueType": "Unmodified",
						"referenceColumnNames": [],
						"value": null,
						"hint": null,
						"defaultValue": null,
						"formatString": null
					},
					{
						"checked": true,
						"name": "Computer ID",
						"renameTo": "ComputerID",
						"type": "source",
						"valueType": "Unmodified",
						"referenceColumnNames": [],
						"value": null,
						"hint": null,
						"defaultValue": null,
						"formatString": null
					},
					{
						"checked": true,
						"name": "System UUID",
						"renameTo": "SystemUUID",
						"type": "source",
						"valueType": "Unmodified",
						"referenceColumnNames": [],
						"value": null,
						"hint": null,
						"defaultValue": null,
						"formatString": null
					},
					{
						"checked": true,
						"name": "Username",
						"renameTo": "Username",
						"type": "source",
						"valueType": "Unmodified",
						"referenceColumnNames": [],
						"value": null,
						"hint": null,
						"defaultValue": null,
						"formatString": null
					},
					{
						"checked": true,
						"name": "OS Platform",
						"renameTo": "OSPlatform",
						"type": "source",
						"valueType": "Unmodified",
						"referenceColumnNames": [],
						"value": null,
						"hint": null,
						"defaultValue": null,
						"formatString": null
					},
					{
						"checked": true,
						"name": "Operating System",
						"renameTo": "OperatingSystem",
						"type": "source",
						"valueType": "Unmodified",
						"referenceColumnNames": [],
						"value": null,
						"hint": null,
						"defaultValue": null,
						"formatString": null
					},
					{
						"checked": true,
						"name": "Service Pack",
						"renameTo": "ServicePack",
						"type": "source",
						"valueType": "Unmodified",
						"referenceColumnNames": [],
						"value": null,
						"hint": null,
						"defaultValue": null,
						"formatString": null
					},
					{
						"checked": true,
						"name": "Chassis Type",
						"renameTo": "ChassisType",
						"type": "source",
						"valueType": "Unmodified",
						"referenceColumnNames": [],
						"value": null,
						"hint": null,
						"defaultValue": null,
						"formatString": null
					},
					{
						"checked": true,
						"name": "Manufacturer",
						"renameTo": "Manufacturer",
						"type": "source",
						"valueType": "Unmodified",
						"referenceColumnNames": [],
						"value": null,
						"hint": null,
						"defaultValue": null,
						"formatString": null
					},
					{
						"checked": true,
						"name": "Model",
						"renameTo": "Model",
						"type": "source",
						"valueType": "Unmodified",
						"referenceColumnNames": [],
						"value": null,
						"hint": null,
						"defaultValue": null,
						"formatString": null
					},
					{
						"checked": true,
						"name": "Computer Serial Number",
						"renameTo": "ComputerSerialNumber",
						"type": "source",
						"valueType": "Unmodified",
						"referenceColumnNames": [],
						"value": null,
						"hint": null,
						"defaultValue": null,
						"formatString": null
					},
					{
						"checked": true,
						"name": "IP Address",
						"renameTo": "IPAddress",
						"type": "source",
						"valueType": "Unmodified",
						"referenceColumnNames": [],
						"value": null,
						"hint": null,
						"defaultValue": null,
						"formatString": null
					},
					{
						"checked": true,
						"name": "Domain Name",
						"renameTo": "DomainName",
						"type": "source",
						"valueType": "Unmodified",
						"referenceColumnNames": [],
						"value": null,
						"hint": null,
						"defaultValue": null,
						"formatString": null
					},
					{
						"checked": true,
						"name": "Count",
						"renameTo": "Count",
						"type": "source",
						"valueType": "Unmodified",
						"referenceColumnNames": [],
						"value": null,
						"hint": null,
						"defaultValue": null,
						"formatString": null
					}
				]
			}
		},
		{
			"route": "/v1/formats/stringifies",
			"arguments": {
				"surroundWithSource": false,
				"enhancedJson": false,
				"rowSeparator": "\n",
				"valueEscape": "",
				"valueEscapeReplace": "",
				"generateDocument": true
			}
		},
		{
			"route": "/v1/destinations/pluginConfigurations/connect/logs-ingestion-destination",
			"arguments": {
				"config": {
					"batchSize": 500,
					"name": "Sentinel - Basic Inventory",
					"tenantId": "{{TenantId}}",
					"clientId": "{{ClientId}}",
					"clientSecret": "{{ClientSecret}}",
					"streamName": "Custom-SentinelBasicInventory",
					"dcrImmutableId": "{{DcrImmutableId}}",
					"ingestionEndpoint": "{{IngestionEndpoint}}"
				},
				"module": "connect",
				"plugin": "logs-ingestion-destination",
				"type": "destinations",
				"destinationType": null,
				"name": "Sentinel - Basic Inventory (Azure Monitor)"
			}
		}
	],
	"destinationType": "logs-ingestion-destination"
}

]

```

#### Option 2: Create the Connection Manually
1. In your Tanium Server open the Connect Module.
1. Create a new connection
1. Select source as "Tanium Reporting (Source Data)"
1. Select the report "Sentinel - Basic Inventory"
1. Select the destination as "Azure Monitor"
1. Use the parameters above to fill in 
	- Tenant ID
	- Client ID
	- Client Secret
	- Log Ingestion URL
	- Data Collection Rule Immutable ID
	- Stream Name
1. Under the Format section check the box for "Generate Document"
1. Update the columns for output to match the stream declaration in the DCR.
